Table of Contents

Interface IImageRegistration2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control an image registration.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("9AF06ADE-D877-4D6F-9C12-968094028115")]
public interface IImageRegistration2 : IImageRegistration
